signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: Our on-balance sheet 90 day personal loan delinquency rate was 40 basis points in Q2 2023, while our annualized personal loan charge off rate was down sequentially to 2.94%... still below pre-COVID levels.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We've been really successful in passing on higher rates in our loans as benchmark rates have gone... the portfolio weighted-average coupon increasing by 40 basis points to 13.6%.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I feel really confident the flywheel is really working... we're really excited about what is in store for us over the next several quarters.
